description_long: This object is a modern shotgun with a sleek, tactical design, featuring a long, cylindrical barrel and a robust receiver. The stock is a thumbhole type, providing ergonomic support and stability for the user, and the grip is integrated into the stock for improved handling. The receiver appears to be constructed from metal, with a matte black finish, and the barrel is extended, suggesting it is designed for accuracy and range. The trigger guard is rounded and moderately sized, enclosing the trigger securely. The shotgun has a visible magazine or loading port beneath the receiver, and the overall construction is solid and utilitarian, suitable for urban tactical scenarios. The surface is predominantly black, with subtle texturing for grip and minimal reflective elements.
description: A modern, tactical shotgun with a long barrel, thumbhole stock, and matte black finish, designed for stability and precision. The object features a rounded trigger guard and robust construction.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular barrel opening and the symmetrical alignment of the stock and receiver.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the barrel, thumbhole stock, and the magazine/loading port beneath the receiver.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the back of the stock and the alignment of the barrel and receiver.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same features as view 1, with clear visibility of the thumbhole stock and barrel.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, long and cylindrical with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, moderately sized, enclosing the trigger with no visible finger grooves or reinforcement
